enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

En Kanmaniye expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of the protagonist.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Chinna Vathiyar, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic struggles of the characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of Rohini and S. P. Balasubramaniyam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for En Kanmaniye was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

En Kanmaniye was released on May 11, 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Kanmaniye, the protagonist expresses a deep yearning for love, encapsulating the bittersweet emotions of romance. The song's soothing melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, complements the heartfelt lyrics by Vaali, making it a classic. It resonates with anyone who has experienced love's joys and sorrows, evoking a sense of nostalgia. This timeless piece remains a favorite for romantic occasions and moments of reflection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Kanmaniye is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Chinna Vathiyar as its backdrop, this song features the enchanting voices of Rohini and S. P. Balasubramaniyam, bringing a unique blend of emotion and nostalgia. Experience the magic of Ilaiyaraaja's composition that resonates deeply with listeners even today.
stanzaMeanings: Oh my dear, listen to what I say.
shutup dont talk to me
If my beloved gets angry, it will be like a blooming flower.
How many people have put flowers in their hearts, go and tell her.
Thinking and thinking, the pearl mountain will go away.
Oh my poet king, what a mess!
Your golden body will be filled with pain.
Ah, oh, I have become a fool and cried.
I am angry, oh poor me.
I love you I love you, you will always speak and leave me.
Oh my dear, listen to what I say.
If my beloved gets angry, it will be like a blooming flower.
Slowly, slowly, looking around, who is searching for the flower?
(The flower is looking for an auto, looking for a taxi, even looking for another person.)
Why do you say this, my mother, it's a drama?
(Yes, the drama is about Thirunavukkarasar.)
Every day, coming around me, putting me in a circle, has my sorrow ended?
(Yes, it has ended, I am empty, I am wandering, will you come?)
Oh, my dear, what is this magic?
(This magic is just sitting, the stomach is burning like a fire engine.)
Without you, I am my flower (yes, yes, yes...)
I am here, why are you?
Oh, my flower, my wealth.
I love you I love you, you will always speak and leave me.
Oh my dear, listen to what I say.
If my beloved gets angry, it will be like a blooming flower.
(In this cinema, saying all these dialogues, isn't it boring?)
I am angry, oh poor me.
(Poor me, my foot.)
I love you I love you, you will always speak and leave me.
Oh my dear, listen to what I say.
If my beloved gets angry, it will be like a blooming flower.
